hero.name: Younas
hero.tagline: 4th semester at VIA University · Backend, fullstack & AI-driven projects

about.label: About me
about.title: Who is Younas?
about.p1: Hi, I'm Younas. I'm studying Software Engineering in my 4th semester at VIA University in Horsens, where I'm currently working on an IoT-based smart greenhouse with a C# backend and machine learning predictions.
about.p2: I'm driven by projects that combine code with something visual or physical — that's why I've built both an AI-powered assembly guide generator (ASEMAI) and a webshop for a jewelry startup alongside my studies.

skills.label: Technologies
skills.title: What I work with
skills.hint: Hover over a technology to see which projects it's used in.

sem1.title: Fundamentals of programming & web development
sem1.description: Introduction to software development with object-oriented Java, basic web development, and mathematical foundations for IT.

PRO1.name: Programming 1
PRO1.desc: Fundamental object-oriented programming in Java with focus on classes, inheritance, UML modeling, and unit testing.

WEB1.name: Web Development 1
WEB1.desc: Frontend web development with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Responsive layout with flexbox/grid, DOM manipulation, and JSON handling.

MSE1.name: Mathematics for Software Engineers
MSE1.desc: Mathematical foundation for IT: linear algebra (vectors, matrices), probability, number representation (binary, hexadecimal), and basic calculus.

project.name: SEP1 — Single-user System
project.desc: Analysis, design, and implementation of a Java-based single-user system. Requirements gathered via use cases, documented with UML, and tested against test specifications.

sem2.title: Object-oriented design, databases & software engineering
sem2.description: Advanced Java programming with design patterns and multithreading, relational databases, and professional software development processes with Scrum and UML.

PRO2.name: Programming 2
PRO2.desc: Object-oriented system development in Java with design patterns, multithreading, unit/system testing, and client/server communication via sockets.

SWE1.name: Software Engineering
SWE1.desc: Software development process with Unified Process (UP) and Scrum. UML modeling (domain model, sequence diagrams, design class diagrams), SOLID principles, and test specifications.

DBS1.name: Database Systems
DBS1.desc: Design and implementation of relational databases: ER modeling, normalization to 3NF, DDL/DML in SQL, transactions, views, and triggers.

project.name: SEP2 — Client/Server System
project.desc: Analysis, design, and implementation of a Java client/server system with a normalized SQL database. Used Scrum + Unified Process, UML, and use case testing.

sem3.title: Distributed systems, .NET & computer architecture
sem3.description: Distributed and heterogeneous systems with Java and C#, CPU architecture and assembly programming, and algorithm design.

DNP1.name: .NET Programming
DNP1.desc: C# and the .NET platform with focus on ASP.NET REST API development, asynchronous programming, Entity Framework (ORM), authentication, and authorization.

PRO3.name: Programming 3
PRO3.desc: Distributed system architectures: communication paradigms (RPC, messaging, REST), middleware, security in distributed systems, and peer-to-peer.

CAO1.name: Computer Architecture & Organization
CAO1.desc: Understanding CPU architecture, logic gates, flip-flops, instruction sets, and assembly programming for microcontrollers. Boolean algebra and digital circuits.

ADS1.name: Algorithms & Data Structures
ADS1.desc: Algorithm design and analysis: time complexity (Big-O), linear and non-linear data structures (graphs, trees), abstract data types, and sorting algorithms.

project.name: SEP3 — Heterogeneous Systems
project.desc: Distributed system with heterogeneous components: security analysis, multiple network protocols, and version control. Java frontend communicates with C# backend.

sem4.title: IoT, Machine Learning, DevOps & modern web development
sem4.description: The full IoT stack: ML models in Python, C# cloud backend, embedded C for sensors, React frontend, and CI/CD pipelines.

MAL1.name: Machine Learning & AI
MAL1.desc: Complete ML workflow from data to model: classification, regression, clustering, and PCA. Used scikit-learn, pandas, and neural networks (MLPClassifier).

DOC1.name: DevOps & Cloud
DOC1.desc: DevOps mindset with Docker, GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines, cloud deployment, and automation of the software delivery pipeline.

WEB2.name: Web Development 2
WEB2.desc: Modern JavaScript and React: closures, prototypes, TypeScript, components, state management, and both CSR/SSR render patterns.

ESW1.name: Embedded Software
ESW1.desc: Embedded C programming for microcontrollers: tasks, queues, semaphores, mutex synchronization, memory management, and unit testing in C.

project.name: SEP4 — Smart Greenhouse (IoT)
project.desc: Large-scale IoT solution with embedded C for sensors, C# cloud backend, ML growth rate prediction, React web interface, and GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines.

projectDetail.videoFallback: Your browser does not support video playback.

asemai.title: ASEMAI-Pro
asemai.shortDesc: AI-powered assembly guide generator — analyzes technical drawings with Claude Vision AI and generates professional step-by-step assembly guides as PDF.
asemai.longDesc: ASEMAI uses Claude Vision AI to analyze technical drawings and generate professional assembly guides. The user uploads a drawing, and the AI produces a detailed PDF with step-by-step instructions.
highlights: Claude Vision AI for image analysis
MVP development from idea to product

hi-jewelry.title: HI Jewelry
hi-jewelry.shortDesc: Website and design system for a jewelry startup.
hi-jewelry.longDesc: Complete webshop and brand identity for HI Jewelry, a jewelry startup. Includes design system, product display, and responsive layout.

sep4-drivhus.title: SEP4 — Smart Greenhouse
sep4-drivhus.shortDesc: Large-scale IoT project with sensor data collection, C# backend, ML growth rate prediction, and web interface.
sep4-drivhus.longDesc: End-to-end IoT solution for a smart greenhouse. Sensors collect temperature, humidity, and light levels. Data is sent to a C# backend running machine learning models to predict plant growth rate and automatically control watering.
highlights: ML models for growth rate prediction

mal1-ml-portfolio.title: Machine Learning Portfolio
mal1-ml-portfolio.shortDesc: 5 ML assignments: regression, classification, neural networks, clustering, and PCA.
mal1-ml-portfolio.longDesc: Collection of 5 machine learning projects from the MAL1 course. Covers supervised and unsupervised learning, from linear regression to neural networks.

web2-pokedex.title: Pokédex
web2-pokedex.shortDesc: Pokédex web app built with Vite + React + React Router. Uses PokeAPI.
web2-pokedex.longDesc: Interactive Pokédex application that fetches data from PokeAPI. Built with React and React Router to demonstrate SPA routing and API integration.

sep1.title: Semester 1 Project
sep1.shortDesc: Fundamental software development project in Java.
sep1.longDesc: First semester project focusing on fundamental Java programming and team collaboration.

sep3.title: Semester 3 Project
sep3.shortDesc: Distributed system focusing on heterogeneous systems and security.
sep3.longDesc: Project focusing on distributed and heterogeneous systems, communication protocols, and security.

doc1-devops.title: DOC1 — DevOps & Cloud
doc1-devops.shortDesc: Assignments and exercises in DevOps, CI/CD, and cloud infrastructure.
doc1-devops.longDesc: Coursework in DevOps and cloud computing with focus on Docker, GitHub Actions, and cloud deployment.

dnp.title: DNP — Distributed Programming
dnp.shortDesc: Course assignment in distributed and network-based programming in C#.
dnp.longDesc: Assignment project in distributed and network-based programming with C# and .NET.
